channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.2.2
item.description:
What's New

  • QuickTime compatible downloads — All video downloads now use H.264 (MP4), fully compatible with QuickTime Player and iMovie
  • Auto-updates — MindExtract now checks for updates automatically and lets you update without leaving the app
  • Improved setup guide — First-launch wizard now matches the app's style with consistent fonts and colors
  • New app icon — Clean white background with black waveform symbol
  • Bug fix — Appearance mode (System/Light/Dark) now switches correctly on first click
